responseMessageContents.text:
All Firebase integration is complete. Here's the summary:

---

### 1. Files Added

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `services/firebaseConfig.ts` | Firebase app, Auth, Firestore initialization with env var placeholders |
| `services/authService.ts` | Login, register, logout, profile CRUD via Firebase Auth + Firestore |
| `services/firestoreService.ts` | Full Firestore CRUD + real-time listeners for equipment, requests, chat, ratings |
| `services/notificationService.ts` | FCM token registration, permission handling, notification payload builder |

### 2. Files Modified

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `contexts/AuthContext.tsx` | Replaced mock auth with Firebase Auth (`onAuthStateChanged`, `signInWithEmailAndPassword`, `createUserWithEmailAndPassword`, `signOut`) + auto profile fetch + FCM token registration |
| `app/(tabs)/(home)/index.tsx` | Equipment list from `fetchEquipmentList()` instead of mock |
| `app/(tabs)/search/index.tsx` | Equipment search from Firestore instead of mock |
| `app/(tabs)/requests/index.tsx` | Real-time request subscription via `subscribeToUserRequests()` |
| `app/(tabs)/add/index.tsx` | Creates equipment in Firestore via `createEquipment()` |
| `app/equipment/[id].tsx` | Fetches equipment + owner from Firestore, creates real request via `createRequest()` |
| `app/request/[id].tsx` | Real-time request subscription, status updates via `updateRequestStatus()` with validation |
| `app/chat/[requestId].tsx` | Real-time chat via `subscribeToMessages()`, sends via `sendMessage()` with permission checks |
| `app/rating/[requestId].tsx` | Submits rating to Firestore via `submitRating()` with duplicate prevention |
| `app/payment/[requestId].tsx` | Updates payment status in Firestore (Tap-ready structure) |
| `app/my-equipment.tsx` | Fetches user's equipment from Firestore |

### 3. What Is Now Fully Live

- **Auth**: Firebase email/password login, register, logout, session persistence via AsyncStorage
- **Firestore reads**: Equipment listing, detail, search, user profiles, requests, chat messages, ratings
- **Firestore writes**: Create equipment, create request, update request status, send messages, submit ratings, update payment status
- **Real-time listeners**: Requests (auto-update on status change), chat messages (live), request detail (live)
- **Data validation**: Status transition rules, participant-only chat, duplicate rating prevention, self-request prevention
- **FCM structure**: Token registration, permission flow, notification payload builder

### 4. What Still Needs Backend / Future Work

| Item | Status |
|---|---|
| **Cloud Functions** | Needed for: push notification delivery, rating aggregation, payment webhooks, admin operations |
| **Tap Payments** | UI is ready, Firestore payment status flow is wired — needs real Tap SDK integration |
| **Cloudinary** | Image upload not yet wired — needs Cloudinary SDK for equipment image uploads |
| **Firestore Security Rules** | Need to be deployed to Firebase console to enforce access control server-side |
| **Firebase credentials** | Set these env vars to activate: `EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID` |

responseMessageContents.title: Connected the app to a real database and added user account features.
responseMessageContents.description: We have replaced the temporary demo data with a live system that saves all information securely. Users can now create real accounts, log in, list equipment for rent, and send rental requests to others. We also enabled live messaging and automatic updates for rental statuses, so everything stays current without needing to refresh the app.
